description.value:
Send Medication prescription extra-vv-bestaande-ma building blocks for patient C. XXX_Brugge
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 1 Extra VV onder bestaande MA Extra VV onder bestaande MA<br style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; background-color: #f9f9f9;">LET OP: VV bij de bestaande MA uit scenario 1.3 (20 dagen later)
Send Medication prescription extra-vv-bestaande-ma resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005' or category.coding.code = '52711000146108').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3891')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '61433')))).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005' or category.coding.code = '52711000146108').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3891')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '61433')))).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '3891|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (ACETYLSALICYLZUUR/PARACETAMOL/COF TAB 250/250/50MG)
